title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Wadhwa Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Wadhwa Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Wadhwa Group in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Wadhwa Group:
Wadhwa Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wadhwa Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
